reviews.title: Worst experience ever
reviews.text: This place is an absolute nightmare. The staff is beyond aggressive—borderline hostile. I booked online, and nowhere did they mention that they’d confiscate my passport until checkout. I needed it with me in case the police stopped me since I had a car, but the receptionist couldn’t care less. No empathy, no willingness to help—just pure rudeness. The whole operation feels like a scam. The hotel is nothing like what they advertise; in fact, it’s a joke. The actual hotel is shoved into a separate building, and they randomly have a restaurant attached—it’s all a disorganized mess. Avoid this place at all costs. There are plenty of legitimate hotels nearby, so do yourself a favor and book anywhere else.

reviews.title: Most staff are very polite,very attentive,courteous, maintenance of rooms needs to be addressed.
reviews.positives: ANRIZON has a very good restraunt where the front desk is located,location right across from beach,it's surrounded by cafés,minimarts,restraunts, taxi stands,juice stands,pho,few minutes from the hotel entrance to a great beach,stunning view from my balcony on 29th floor,
reviews.negatives:
I have to keep on mind what I'm paying per night when doing reviews,with that said! Two main problems,first,I paid for three weeks,in a hot climate I always book a room with a refrigerator and I expect it to work,no not for beer ,for mineral water,juices,milk,etc., fruit.
First, they replaced the fridge in the room when I told them it didn't work,then the second fridge was just as useless,it was no colder in the fridge then outside the fridge but the hotel insisted these are low power fridges,it was totally useless.
Secondly there was a leak from the toilet tank or plumbing ,bathroom floor was constantly wet,there was zero effort to fix it,nothing !
The place is too busy,waiting to long for elevators,no balcony furniture,
They might want to give their room hallway rugs a shampooing a cleaning occasionally,it's filthy.The building is used by various hotels,each with their own floors of rooms,I prefer smaller hotels,less hallway traffic,noise.

reviews.title: Horrible Service!!!
reviews.text: I was extremely disappointed with the restaurant as well as the hotel.  Imagine going to a restaurant and having to ask for water TWICE and being ignored!!  I cut myself on the sharp corner of the bed and didn't realize I was bleeding until the next morning when I woke up, as a result the sheet down by my leg was stained with blood.  The cleaning lady showed up and I asked her to change the sheets, she didn't.  She was supposed to remove trash, I had to take it out to her myself in the hall way.  I asked to speak to a manager TWICE and still haven't been able to.  The worst customer service I've experienced in a while.  Maybe I was the anomaly.

reviews.title: The housekeeping staff is very lazy in cleaning. The room has strange noises all night long.
reviews.text: At first, I didn't know it was in a building; I thought it was a separate hotel until I checked in. The reception desk was in the restaurant. They gave me a room key on the highest floor and we had to find it ourselves. The elevator took quite a while. When I first entered, it didn't look much like the pictures, but it was okay, just not the two single beds I had booked. There was a slight sea view if you stepped out onto the balcony (the balcony is connected to other rooms, with no partition; on the evening of the third night when I went out to the balcony to see if it was raining, there was a bare-chested man wearing only a pair of briefs who walked past my room's balcony, but I managed to slip back inside and lock the door, we are just girls, so we were very scared and didn't dare to go back out on the balcony anymore). Every day I requested room cleaning, but they only provided more tea and coffee, toilet paper, and towels; they didn't sweep the floor, change the mattress cover, change the pillowcases, or wash the coffee cups. Whenever we were present in the room and asked them to clean the floor, they did a quick job with a very smelly rag; after they left, we couldn't stand it and sprayed perfume all over the room. There were strange noises every night when going to sleep, which made me scared and hard to sleep. The reception staff had only one girl who was enthusiastic and quick but still lacked professionalism; the other girl was shorter and very unpleasant and tight-lipped. One commendable point was that the TV had internet connectivity and could watch music and movies, but it occasionally lost connection or turned off by itself while watching, which was very confusing. The room door wasn't safe because even when locked from the inside, staff could still swipe the card to open it.

reviews.title: cheap! and cheaply made
reviews.text:
Stayed at Anrizon Hotel because it was very cheap, but the experience was a bit disappointing.
The hotel is actually inside an older apartment building and was very hard to find. The place looks quite run down and not very well maintained, which was surprising considering the high ratings. There was also a strange smell in the room. The bed and sheets were thin and hard, and the towels had holes in them. The hallways were dirty and there were even mattresses sitting outside some of the rooms, which made the place feel neglected.
On the positive side, the toilet and shower were clean. However, the chair and bed looked a bit questionable. The staff also seemed tired and not very welcoming.
Overall, it’s very cheap, but I probably wouldn’t stay here again.

reviews.positives:
Ein sehr gutes Hotel in sehr zentraler Lage mit unzähligen Restaurants und Supermärkten und Shops 👍🏾 Eine wahnsinnige Aussicht mit Meerblick vom 29 ten Stockwerk 😎🏖️💯👏🏽....war sehr zufrieden mit diesem Hotel...Preis Leistung ist ausgezeichnet 👍🏾.

Zimmer 2920 😎 perfekte Aussicht auf die Skyline und aufs Meer 🏖️.

Der Ort Nha Trang ist glaube ich das Mallorca der Russen 🏖️😎🍻🕺🏽... Hatte keine Probleme mit den Russischen Menschen ganz im Gegenteil sie waren sehr freundlich...und haben sich auch nicht daneben benommen...wie man manchmal so die Vorurteile hat...schwarze Scharfe gibt es überall auch bei den deutschen Gästen 🙈...von daher alles entspannt.
reviews.negatives:
Keine Kartenzahlung möglich obwohl es booking so steht 🤬...ging mir mega auf die Nerven... ebenso

Ein wenig irritiert bin ich beim Versuch einzuchecken öfters um den Block gelaufen 🥵 da ich Rezeption gesucht habe 🤔🧐...warum auch immer ist diese Rezeption für so ein großes Hotel im Restaurant*Anrizion*  untergebracht 🤨 weshalb? Ich habe keine Ahnung.

Das Restaurants des Hotels kann ich nicht bewerten 🙅🏽‍♂️...kleiner Tipp bringt ordentlich Zeit mit beim Warten/Fahren des Aufzugs 😅 diese können manchmal 6-8 dauern je nachdem wie viele Etagen angehalten wird...

Die Kraft der *Reinigungskräfte* hat nicht stattgefunden zumindest nicht bei mir im Zimmer... Handtücher gewechselt und schnell wieder raus...so musste ich von 4 Tagen meinen Müll auf dem Balkon platzieren, da ich nirgends einen Mülleimer gefunden habe um meinen müll selber runterbringen 👎🏽...da war schlecht..

reviews.title: Bỏ đồ của khách.
reviews.text: Mình có đặt phòng để ở hai đêm 6,7 tháng 8. Đặt trên Agoda, không biết thế nào mà hai đêm lại hai phòng khác nhau, khi xong đêm thứ nhất dọn đồ sang phòng thứ hai có bỏ quên một khăn tắm của chị mình  và một bình nước Inochi màu xanh. Sau khi dọn đi sau đêm thứ hai thì hai chị em mình check out sớm tầm 6h sáng để ăn sáng đi Đà Lạt, nhớ ra là quên đồ nên vào nhắn lại lễ tân và lễ tân đã có xin lại số điện thoại, để liên hệ lại vì Hk 8h hơn mới đi làm, vậy mà cũng không thấy gọi gì cả. mình đi vội quá không nhớ lấy cả căn cước. Sáng nay mình quay lại hỏi căn cước với đồ thì người ta trả lời mình là đã đem bỏ rồi ( bỏ cái bình của mình, nói là giống cái chai bình thường nên bỏ...), lễ tân còn nói là sau 4 ngày đến một tuần thì mới đem bỏ. reviews.title: 7時から17時までmax89dBの工事爆音
reviews.negatives:
下層階工事のため、毎朝7時から夕方17時まで耳を聾するmax89dBの大騒音が響き渡り、耳栓をしても頭に振動が来ててとても滞在できない。搬入のためかエレベーターもボロボロ。まさに工事現場にいる状態。会話はおろか頭痛と吐き気で体調不良になり、一日を屋外で寝て過ごした。
受付はロビーではなく、左隣りのレストラン内デスク。パスポートを預けるか、VND100万のデポジット二択。初めにもらった部屋はエアコン不動、ベランダドアの取っ手が外れて閉まらず。親切なスタッフが同行して交換してくれた部屋自体は悪くはなかったが、とにかくうるさく工事終了までは営業すべきではないホテル。Booking.comにも苦情を伝えたが、通知をオンにせよと言ったきり一週間後の現在も正式な回答はない。残念。

reviews.title: View amazing, rest ok !
reviews.text:
Sunset view from the room was just amazing and room has enough space (we stayed at floor 41) , location is fine i.e. beach is just across the road, supermarkets, spas and cafes are there in same locality. 

Problems : Their staff is not educated in English plus they are not well trained also, they do not accept card payments, sometimes lifts do not go to floor 41 so you go to floor 40 and then take the stairs. Beaches are not peaceful in the evening and night, you will always hear traffic which was annoying for us. This beach is only ok for morning persons.

reviews.title: Reception and cleaning
reviews.text: It was nice and comfortable, but at the reception, I was asked whether to deposit 1 million dong or my passport. Since I didn't know, I thought it was a bit much to leave my passport, so I deposited 1 million dong. I don't know if I overlooked something, but I wish I had known in advance. The cleaning staff came knocking on the door early in the morning, and it felt a bit unpleasant. They didn't leave toilet paper unless I asked for it, which didn't feel like a typical hotel experience, so I didn't know where to get it. I thought those aspects were inconvenient. On the other hand, there were plenty of supermarkets and restaurants nearby, which was great. The beach was also close, and everyone was out for walks in the evening, so I felt safe and didn't worry at all. I might consider staying here again if the opportunity arises.

reviews.title: Good location, ok hotel
reviews.text:
Anrizon is a bit away from the city center, which makes it a more relaxed and quieter spot. The location is great, close to the beach and surrounded by foreign restaurants. There’s also an MMA gym nearby called Sports Unite, which offers Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, adding to the convenience for anyone training.

The hotel is decent for the price, but checking in can be a little confusing. You’ll need to ask the receptionist at the restaurant to check in. Also, note that if you have a motorbike, there's a fee each time you go in or out of the parking structure.

Overall, it's a convenient location and an okay hotel for the value

reviews.title: MIxed Bag - some good some bad
reviews.text:
You can have a good stay here but it depends what's important
Location - good if you want to be a short distance from Nha Trang city, in a more local area
Rooms are good value with good quality beds and shower
Negatives
The staff - rude and not helpful
Check in / out - you check in at a restaurant although the hotel has a large lobby. 
It's slow, 20 mins to check in, 30 mins to check out
They may ask to keep your passport. They keep it in a plastic folder, not in a safe, next to the desk in easy view, in a busy restaurant.  Unacceptable.

reviews.title: Great location, value for money
reviews.text:
Overall, it’s a good stay given the affordable price with great location. Here are some downsides:

1. Check-in is done at the restaurant "Anrizon Steakhouse," which could be confusing. You need to provide a passport or 1 million dong as a deposit. 

2. The Suite Sea View room I booked via Agoda mentioned it would come with a balcony, but the room I checked into doesn’t have one.

3. There are limited lifts available to access the hotel room floors and has to share to lift with other non hotel guests.

4. Only one room access card will be given. The hotline number provided to call reception from our room is not working.

5. Require to wait 5~15 mins for check out. 

6. The staffs are friendly but have difficulty conversing, as they don’t speak English very well.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Thực sự trải nghiệm của mình khá là tệ. Tụi mình bay mất 2 tiếng và đợi tới 10h20 mới về đến ks đã khá mệt. Vừa mở cửa thì phòng đó đang có người ở rồi và tụi mình bị shock và phải xuống lại tầng 1 gọi lễ tân, đợi thêm 30' xử lí và phải sài một phòng khác kiến trúc không giống phòng mình đã book. Rùi vừa đi tắm thì cống bị tắc nước, ko thoát. Ks thiếu nước rửa tay, mình đã nhắn nhân viên nhưng mình ở 2 ngày vẫn ko thấy nước rửa tay đâu. Sáng sớm hôm sau tụi mình đang ngủ thì nhâm viên dọn dẹp bấm chuông, tụi mình chưa kịp tỉnh dậy thì thấy bác tự mở cửa ra vào phòng, hoảng hồn thật sự. Chiều hôm thứ 2 tụi mình đi chơi về đến nơi thì thấy thẻ không mở được nữa, lại đơik 20' nhân viên lên giao thẻ mới, mình cũng không hiểu sao trong khi đã kí ở 2 ngày. Sáng hôm sau tưởng thoát nạn thì vừa tắm xong cái cống nhà vs lại không thoát nước, thế là nước laik tràn tới chân giường. 

Đáng lẽ ra chuyến đi nha trang sẽ vui vẻ hơn nhưng thực sự vụ khách sạn làm tụi mình tụt hứng rất nhiều. Rất mong ks có thể check laik operation system để khách có trải nghiệm tuyệt vời hơn

reviews.title: Annoying lady at the reception, but great hotel for a very cheap price
reviews.text:
The lady at the reception started to call and send me SMS texts 15 minutes before my check out time...why ?
I checked out perfectly in time (arrived at the reception to give the key cards back at 11:59)...and still she said that she has "to check my room" before I can go. That's really so annoying.
It's a pity that they hired someone so incompetent that really doesn't know how to treat their customers.
The hotel is great, the room was at the 29th floor, was very big and was possible to see the sea from the balcony. The facilities are also great:  bathroom, shower, big armchair, desk, big TV. BUT the bed was not great because I booked a double bed but actually it wasn't really a double bed but 2 single beds put one next to each other...making it impossible to sleep n the center of the bed. Anyway everything else was great...and especially it's a great value for money.

reviews.title: Anrizon Hotel Nha Trang
reviews.text: It is a clean well situated hotel about 5km from the tourist area. The front desk is the reception area of the Anrizon restaurant, which was a bit confusing at first. The hotel itself is part of a 4 high rise complex that is a mix of condotels, hotels and apartments. Many young Russian and Vietnamese families in the area. Plenty of restaurants in the area and the beach is across the street.

Phòng tầng 24  không gian nhỏ, máy quạt ko đủ lạnh, kêu ồn, ko có máy quạt, đã báo nv hỗ trợ dùm máy quạt nhưng vẫn ko có.  Thêm phòng đối diện sửa nhà khoan tường ầm ĩ cả ngày. reviews.title: Hoàn toàn thất vọng về cách làm việc của khách sạn. Khách sạn 4 sao nhưng thái độ và sự chuyên nghiệp của nhân viên còn
reviews.negatives:
Nhân viên buồng phòng và lễ tân rất không chuyên nghiệp. Quá giờ checkin 1 tiếng, vẫn kêu khách đợi tiếp và đổ lý do là do khách trước trả phòng trễ nên không còn cách nào khác, bảo khách đợi thêm mà không có chính sách đền bù thoả đáng. Nếu đã dự trù được phòng đó cho khách tiếp theo vậy tại sao không có biện pháp nào khác mà lại bắt khách đợi thêm trong khi đã quá giờ nhận phòng 1 tiếng? Tới khi lên tới phòng vẫn phải đợi thêm để buồng phòng dọn nốt.
Mỗi lần nhân viên buồng phòng dọn xong lúc vào đều thấy có 1,2 con gián con bò tùm lum (có hình chụp lại). 
Wifi trong phòng hư, nhân viên lên xem xét cũng chỉ giải thích qua loa rằng bây giờ đã là 11 giờ khuya kĩ thuật đã về hết, wifi ngoài hành lang vẫn xài tốt chỉ có trong phòng bị chắc là do trong phòng rồi. Vậy không lẽ cách giải quyết là kêu khách ra hành lang xài wifi hả?

reviews.title: Outstanding stay at Nha Trang
reviews.text: Located less than 10 mins drive to the North of central Nha Trang, I didn’t expect much from this booking but it turned out excellent from staffs to room facilities. Both check-in and out processes took like no time, Smart card for door lock and elevator (goes straight to the corresponding floot once swiped), Room was clean, fresh and fully equipped bathroom. TV channels were laggy but hey, who even use it during trip?! In short, a highly recommend place to stay in Nha Trang.

reviews.title: Tạm được.
reviews.positives: Địa điểm đẹp ngay trước biển. Có ban công rộng nhìn ra biển thoáng mát. Khăn tắm dày dặn.sạch thơm.
reviews.negatives: Căn hộ nằm trên tầng 41 của chung cư Mường Thanh Viễn Triều và thang máy đã bị kẹt 1 lần khi chúng tôi lên. Sau đó chúng tôi chuyển sang thang máy khác thì cũng bị cửa cứ tự mở ra đóng vào rất kỳ lạ. Tường của căn hộ có khu bị mốc vì ẩm, sơn tường có chỗ bong tróc, tạo cảm giác không được chăm sóc chỉn chu, ngoài ban công cũng không được chăm chút, dù là trồng cây xương rồng nhưng lá để khô héo cũng không được cắt tỉa hay dọn dẹp, rất đáng tiếc. Phía ngoài khu vực sảnh trước cửa cầu thang tầng 41 nhìn hơi lạnh lẽo. Không có cảm giác chào đón. Tôi nghĩ nên đầu tư trang trí căn hộ có gu hơn, cách trang trí hiện tại nhìn không có ấn tượng, quá bình thường cho một căn hộ với giá tiền đó.

reviews.title: worth every penny

reviews.text:
The beach is across the street. Room is spacious and clean, reasonable price. There are few ants but okay. Book a room with city view but I still able to see the beach from my balcony. TV is not working. Comfortable bed but pillows are too soft. 

The reservation desk is inside their small restaurant. The setting is a little bit messy, not a professional working environment. The room is locate in an apartment building. The organise more like condotel than a professional hotel. Quite a surprise because I see that they're showing on the internet as a 4 star hotel. Maybe not the 4-star I'm thinking about. 

Overall, this is still a good place to stay when visit Nha Trang, worth the money.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is super cute and very spacious. The view is extremely worth it considering the price. The rooms are clean and fully equipped. However, being on the 29th floor is quite inconvenient as the parking lot in the basement gets very crowded. Additionally, for those who like to go out for a stroll and take pictures, you will have to pay for parking repeatedly; in one day, I have to take my car out about 5-6 times because I keep going in and out to change clothes. It would be more convenient if the hotel coordinated with the parking lot and gave guests a separate parking card. Most of the hotels I've experienced generally do not charge for parking, and I also tend to carry little cash on me.

I was a bit worried at first after reading some comments complaining about the staff, but my actual experience was totally fine. The staff were polite and there were no issues or bad attitudes. The hotel is right by the beach, so it’s super convenient for swimming. It’s about 4km from the city center, but I rented a motorbike so getting around wasn’t a problem. Everything was really great!

reviews.title: The greatest price and value for 3 star-hotel
reviews.text:
The room was cleaned and spacious with a balcony for the nice view of water or town which is value for the price. I stayed 6 nights without a problem. The room and facilities look decent. Hardworking housekeepers tried to keep room clean and refill the room toiletries and other room benefits every day.  Location is exceptional! 
Khách sạn rất ổn so với tầm giá, có ban công view đẹp và thoáng l, đúng chuẩn 3 sao đầy đủ tiện nghi, sạch sẽ, các chị dọn phòng làm việc đầy đủ và team sẵn sàng cung cấp các vật dụng cần thiết. 
+1 cho bạn receptionist Ngọc Anh thân thiện và làm việc rất tốt trong khoản chăm sóc khách hàng. Ngành dịch vụ cần nhiều nhân viên như bạn.

reviews.title: beautiful view
reviews.text: The hotel is located in an apartment area, with a convenient road front! The room has a beautiful sea view and part of the road along the coastline, and the room is quite clean! The amenities are sufficient, and the staff is quite polite! Everything is pretty good compared to the booking time and the reasonable price! The downsides are that the bathroom drains slowly when showering, the slippers are small, the Wi-Fi is weak, and the TV is watchable but without a cable subscription, so the weak Wi-Fi makes it almost impossible to watch anything! It is quite suitable for quietly enjoying the sea. Haha.

reviews.title: Great value hotel with magnificent view
reviews.text: We booked the room with partial seaview and it had a really nice view of the sea and the city. Hotel is located on  29th Floor so the view is magnificent. There is a nice round sofa next to the big window and it's really nice to sit down there with a coffee or drink and just enjoy the view. The room is big and aircon is Daikin so very cold. Shower comes with strong water pressure and bed is comfortable. It includes coffee and tea which is very nice. It's right next to Hon Chong beach so very easy to have a walk alongside the beach everyday. We really enjoyed our stay here.

reviews.title: JUST BOOK ALREADY!!!
reviews.text: Stayed here for 6 nights and it was perfect! It was around ***/night! The room was extremely spacious and bigger than I expected with a full desk, a beautiful and comfortable single sofa with an ottoman, and cleaned every day. Fresh towels each day and overall great value for your money. The elevators are a bit slow at times due to so many floors (near 40) so your patience may be tested but other than that everything was great. 45-second walk to the beach and restaurants and cafés surrounding the place. This place has set the standard for me when it comes to budget-friendly hotels. When I come back to Nha Trang I am staying here and may even upgrade to one of their top-tier suites just for the experience!

reviews.title: Catastrophique Horrible !!!
reviews.text: Nous avons séjourné deux nuits dans cet établissement, nous avons loué une suite avec vue. Au final nous nous sommes retrouvés dans une chambre dégoûtante avec une petite terrasse et deux climatisation, extrêmement bruyante, moche qui gâche totalement la vue, ce qui ne correspond absolument pas à ce que nous avions réservé.. évidemment, nous avons demandé à changer de chambre, les deux réceptionniste sont restés très froide l’une d’elle a pris le plaisir de sourire, en nous, voyant dans la détresse ne nous ont certainement pas aidé. C’est une mauvaise expérience de séjour. Faites très attention si vous souhaitez réserver dans cet établissement ce que vous payez et les photos que vous voyez ne correspondent absolument pas à la réalité, j’ai pris des photos et des vidéos et je ne souhaite à personne cette mésaventure. Le site a malheureusement rien pu faire car c’est l’établissement qui décide au final. Cela évidemment, gâché deux jours et deux nuits que nous espérions romantique face à la mer en un cauchemar. Si cela a pu aider une personne, j’en suis ravi pour ceux qui réservent dans cet établissement. Bonne chance.

reviews.text:
Also irgendwie ist es kein wirkliches Hotel, sondern eigene Apartments. Wände dreckig, die Bodenfliesen sind teilweise gebrochen und locker. Die Zimmer sehen auch überhaupt nicht so aus wie auf den Bildern, vlt hatte ich nur Pech aber im Flur standen ab und zu mal andere Türen auf zur Reinigung und die sahen auch nicht wie auf den Bildern aus. Die Rezeption ist im Restaurant, Koffer stehen einfach mitten zwischen den Tischen wo Leute am essen sind. Und eine Kaution von 1 Mio oder Reisepass wird beim Check In verlangt. 
Im enteffekt ist es nicht wirklich angenehm, war dafür aber auch nicht wirklich teuer. Dennoch gibts für den gleichen Preis oder paar Euro mehr auch anständige Hotel in der Umgebung.

reviews.title: Bom. Mas
reviews.text:
No geral, a minha estadia correu bem e não tenho nada de negativo a apontar em relação ao quarto ou ao serviço.

No entanto, tive uma preocupação relacionada com a segurança após ter perdido o cartão de acesso ao quarto. Dirigi-me à receção no início da noite para pedir um novo cartão e solicitei o cancelamento do anterior, uma vez que fiquei com receio de que pudesse ser utilizado por outra pessoa — especialmente porque o número do quarto está escrito manualmente no cartão.

Na altura, foi-me apenas dito para ter cuidado com os meus bens, sem confirmação clara de que o cartão tinha sido desativado. Essa desativação só foi confirmada no dia seguinte.

Além disso, foi-me dito que o cartão não tinha qualquer identificação, o que não corresponde à realidade.

Foi-me também cobrada uma taxa de 150.000 VND pelo cartão perdido. Apesar de assumir essa responsabilidade, considero que o hotel poderia melhorar a forma como gere este tipo de situações, especialmente ao nível da comunicação e das medidas de segurança imediatas.

Fora este ponto, tudo o resto durante a estadia correu bem.

reviews.title: 절대 비추
reviews.text:
일단 광고에 수영장 사진이 나오는데 수영장 없음.
헬스장 당연히 없음.
큰 빌딩에 몇 개 층만 임대해서 사용하는 호텔같지 않은 호텔.
리셉션도 1층 안리존 레스토랑 내에 있음.ㅠㅠ
여기까진 이해함.
스위트룸 사진보고 예약했는데 객실상태가 한국모텔수준보다 못함.
베개커버도 안 씌워져있고ㅠ 오랫동안 룸이 방치된 느낌이었음.
내가 배정받은 스위트룸 맞은편에는 쓰레기 저장고가 있어서 복도부터 꽉 차 있는 냄새가 객실까지 들어와 체크인하자마자 한국 가고싶어짐.
도저히 안 되겠어서 객실변경 요청한 방은 전망은 좋았으나 침구류 교체가 안된건지 밤에 자는데 다리가 너무 간질거려 이불을 들셔보니 각종 이물질이 많이 묻어있어 끔찍했음.
왠만하면 이런 후기 잘 안 남기는데 하아... 이 호텔은 개선이 많이 필요해 보입니다.
룸 뷰 보고 예약하실 분들, 진심 다시 생각해 보십시오.

reviews.title: 불편한 여행
reviews.text:
우리는 한달간 베트남 여행을 하는 가족 입니다.

체크인은 안리존레스토랑에서 해야되요 
레스토랑안에 있어서 좁고 불편했어요
보증금 100만동이 있어요
객실은 넓어요 
객실뷰는 옆 아파트뷰 였어요 .옆집이 다 보여요 
그리고 옆집에서도 우리를 구경해요 ㅎㅎ
청소가 잘 안되어있고, 침구가 축축해요.
에어컨은 온도를 낮게틀다 고장나면 고객의 과실로 책임을 돌려요. 그래서 보증급을 받나봐요.
선풍기도 있어요 
샤워를하면 벽틈으로 물이 나와서 객실로 흘러요.
객실내에 테이블이 없어서 불편했어요 

한달간 여행중이지만 이가격에 더 좋은 호텔을 예약할수 있어요 ^^

reviews.title: 숙박하기 힘들었어요
reviews.text:
2박했어요 첫째날 매트리스에서 쉰 냄새가 너무 나서 비위가 상했습니다
다음날 매트리스에서 냄새난다고 그랬더니 침구를 갈아주니 냄새는 많이 안 나는 거 같았어요
하루 자고 다음날 화장대에서 바퀴벌레를 보았어요
지금 다른 호텔로 옮겼는데 다리에 벌레가 물렸고요
피부에 비립종 같은거 생겼어요
수건은 가장자리가 헤져있어요
이곳은 오피스텔같은 곳인데 한층은 호텔로 사용하는거 같아요
체크인은 아리존레스토랑에서 해야해요
 직원분은 친절하세요
그리고 문에 안전핀이 없어서 좀 불안했어요
안전핀은  달아주면 좋을거 같아요
좋은 점은 1층에 마트가 있고 뒷골목에 맛집이 있어요
바로 옆건물 1층에 노트북 충전 가능한 저렴하고 깔끔한 커피점도 있어요
